law: A solved structural problem is not fully solved until a dedicated Standards issue agent is registered to prevent recurrence.

agents.title: Wildcard Contamination Sentinel
agents.purpose: Detect wildcard-only MOVE rows and block abstract seeds until concrete expansion exists.

agents.title: Artifact Boundary Sentinel
agents.purpose: Keep receipts, backups, generated inventories, and logs out of active structure metrics.
triggers: generated artifact counted in active inventory
backup paths appear in purge ledger

agents.title: Tier Safety Verifier
agents.purpose: Validate safe-tier move classification against cross-repo dependency reality.
triggers: Tier1 row has cross-repo inbound importer

agents.title: Projection Purity Agent
agents.purpose: Ensure projection repos remain hollow shells and do not reclaim runtime or governance ownership.
triggers: runtime or standards internals appear inside projection repo

agents.title: Nested Standards Detector
agents.purpose: Detect and quarantine nested copies of LeeWay-Standards inside non-owner repos.
triggers: nested LeeWay-Standards folder discovered outside root

agents.title: Coupling Boundary Monitor
agents.purpose: Detect external inbound importers for move groups and require subgroup-safe relocation.
triggers: group apply has external inbound importers

agents.title: Runtime Leakage Detection
agents.purpose: Catch runtime-chain assets escaping designated runtime ownership boundaries.
triggers: runtime execution files appear outside runtime repos

agents.title: Governance Leakage Detection
agents.purpose: Catch standards/governance logic escaping LeeWay-Standards ownership boundaries.
triggers: governance rule implementation appears outside LeeWay-Standards
